title: Review: wallet/ crate security and correctness
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — Good crypto hygiene overall. Key risks: (1) ivk_bytes() exposes IVK via plain return type; (2) balance() counts undecrypted/witness-free notes (pre-existing tracked issues); (3) migrations v1-v5 not transactional, crash-unsafe on first-time setup; (4) HttpFetcher blocks async thread if called from tokio context without spawn_blocking.
Confidence: 15% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty: cannot verify groth16 proof path (needs 48MB params), cannot verify Zip212Enforcement::GracePeriod edge cases on testnet, cannot verify diversifier-advance correctness under concurrent callers (theoretically safe with max_connections=1 but not formally verified). Would increase confidence with: full integration test against live lightwalletd, nullifier scanning addition, Orchard spend path coverage.
